title: Li Auto Q2 2026 Revenue and Earnings Performance Analysis
text: Li Auto's Q2 2026 earnings have revealed a company navigating significant competitive pressures. The company's revenue performance and earnings metrics reflect ongoing challenges in maintaining pricing power amid aggressive cost-cutting by rivals. Non-GAAP revenue rose 16.7% quarter-over-quarter, but fell 4.5% year-over-year, reflecting the challenges of maintaining pricing amid intense competition. The company's product strategy has grown more conservative. Li Auto is likely to launch only one new pure-electric SUV in 2026, shifting its focus back to range-extended models. The company decided to adjust its vehicle lineup, product strategy, and R&D approach, intensify overseas market expansion, and increase investment in AI. The balance between BEV transition and EREV strength remains a critical issue for investors assessing earnings quality and sustainability.
